tweets.text:
.@ICEgov arrests alleged MS-13 associate wanted for aggravated homicide in El Salvador— @DHSgov says Idalia Isabel Morales-Mejia is an illegal immigrant wanted in El Salvador for aggravated homicide and identified as an associate of MS-13 —She was arrested in Northern Virginia.

Authorities say Morales-Mejia was charged in El Salvador back in 2013 and later entered the U.S. illegally at an unknown time and location.

She was located and arrested in Woodbridge after updated intel from El Salvador’s fugitive task force.

“Idalia Isabel Morales-Mejia is not only a known associate of the notorious MS-13 transnational criminal organization, but she apparently attempted to flee justice in her native country by illegally residing in Virginia,” said ICE Washington, D.C. Field Office Director Robert Guadian. “The media would consider her to be a ‘non-criminal’ because she has no known criminal history in the United States — despite the fact that she is facing charges for aggravated homicide in El Salvador. ICE Washington, D.C. will continue to prioritize public safety by arresting and removing criminal alien offenders from our Washington, D.C. and Virginia communities.”

ICE says she is now in custody pending immigration proceedings.
